items.summary: On the LoginPage, ensure the admin login option/button/tab is clearly visible and accessible to users without requiring any special steps. Both 'User Login' and 'Admin Login' modes must be visually distinguishable and immediately available on page load.

After a successful admin login via Internet Identity and OTP verification, the user must be automatically redirected to the admin dashboard (/admin/dashboard). After a successful regular user login, the user must be redirected to the user dashboard or registration page as appropriate.

In the Navbar, admin-only navigation links (e.g., links to admin dashboard, document review, death verification, legal verification, controlled access release) must only appear when the authenticated user is confirmed to be an admin. They must not appear for guests or regular authenticated users.
